description_long: This advertising board features a large, rectangular display panel mounted on three sturdy vertical poles, set on a circular patch of grass. The front of the board displays a vibrant advertisement for Coca-Cola, with the word 'REPLAY' prominently at the top and a dynamic background image. The base of the board includes a smaller horizontal sign labeled 'BUMPERS', positioned in front of the main structure. The rear of the board is plain, with the supporting poles and the back of the display visible, showing a solid, matte finish. The frame of the board is thick and robust, likely made of metal, providing structural support and durability. The overall design suggests it is intended for outdoor use in a public or recreational setting.
description: A large, freestanding outdoor advertising board with a Coca-Cola ad, supported by three metal poles on a grassy base and a smaller 'BUMPERS' sign in front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full advertising display with the Coca-Cola ad, the 'REPLAY' header, and the 'BUMPERS' sign on a grassy base.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the thin profile of the board and the depth of the supporting poles, with the display panel edge-on.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain back of the board, the three supporting poles, and the structure's solid, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the slim profile and the arrangement of the support poles, with minimal detail on the display itself.
attribute_frame_design: thick metal frame with rectangular shape and solid support poles
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed poster for a beverage brand (Coca-Cola) with bold text and imagery
